subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: On this day scarce can be found among the Jews one truly devout. When once I sojourned in Tiberias, no trace of true religion did I perceive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کمتر متدین در میان یهود پیدا میشود زمانی در طبریه بودم ابدا بوی دین
subcodes.subjects: @religious rituals minimized or eliminated, @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @stories; anecdotes
